content.en:
Above the city of Roselle.

Lord Aogu, throw down a demon seed first, and when the demon seed attacks Luoshen City, that Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse will definitely escape.

At the moment when the other party fled, he shot again to catch and kill him.

That way, it's no problem.

Rumble!!!!!!

The demon seed descended, and the terrifying aura covered the entire city of Roselle.

Those mythical to the Dao realm, the eternal to the Dao powerhouse, can't resist the breath of the demon seed at all, and one by one their consciousness will sink.

City.

Ye Tian's other copy body was still in Roselle City, and of course he was a little puzzled when he saw the demon seed suddenly descending.

How could the demon seed suddenly run here, if the demon seed came, he shouldn't have known about it now!

The aura of the demon seed could not be hidden at all, it was too easy to identify.

And this demon seed appeared out of nowhere.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded all around, and he quickly sensed the aura of another Eternal Dao Realm.

"The !!! of the Ogu Kingdom"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Lord of Ogu is hiding in the shadows, but he is still being spied on by the Copying Talent.

Obviously, this demon seed was unleashed by the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

"Lord Agu actually used the demon seed to slaughter Luoshen City, what does he want to do?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, after sensing the breath of the demon seed, the city lord of Luo Shen ran away directly.

The demon seed has no consciousness, he only knows killing, and there are countless creatures in Roselle City, so naturally he will not chase and kill a Roselle City Lord.

Swish!

Wow!

The lord of the ancient kingdom has gone to kill the lord of Roselle, and he is going to wait for the lord of Roselle to run a little farther away, and then kill him.

Then, he came back.

......

"The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom has disappeared, it should be to chase the Lord of Luoshen, a good opportunity!"

Before Ye Tian left, a blow hit the demon seed.

This demon seed is the weakest kind of demon seed, and its strength is not as good as Ye Tian's, and after one blow, the demon seed was injured.

Then, Ye Tian fled, and this demon seed chased Ye Tian away.

Before leaving.

Ye Tian sent a message to Luo Wushuang to attack the sea of punishment: "You guys immediately flee from Luoshen City, otherwise you will definitely die!"

After speaking, Ye Tian had already fled.

However.

When these powerhouses in Roselle City saw that the demon seed was lured away, they thought they were safe, so they naturally didn't leave.

And Luo Wushuang and Xinghai, when they heard Ye Tian's summons, although they didn't know what was happening, they still rushed out of Luoshen City as soon as possible and fled in another direction.

It may be fine, but if it's okay, they'll just come back.

But once something happens, they will be able to escape!

......

Before the Lord of Roselle City had escaped far, he was grabbed by the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom with one hand, and his body was swallowed into the main body of the Ancient Kingdom, and he fell into a deep sleep.

"Luo Shen City, there is even an Eternal Dao Realm!"

The face of the Lord of Ogu changed.

He hadn't paid much attention before, but it didn't affect anything, he could have caught up with the other party.

Moreover, he had been using an Eternal Primordial Treasure to hide his identity, and even if the Eternal Dao Realm discovered him, he would not know his identity.

As everyone knows, his identity has already been spied on by Ye Tian with his talent for copying.

Wow!

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom went to hunt down Ye Tian, how fast his speed was, and directly locked on Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also knew that he couldn't escape, so the moment he fled, he entered the Nine Extremes Void through the Nine Extremes Alliance token and summoned the high-level members of the Nine Extremes Alliance, these high-level beings were all extremely powerful existences, and some of them were still country masters.

Ye Tian didn't know them, but he also spread all of them.

"Lord Oku is chasing me!"

"The Lord of the Augu Kingdom threw a demon seed into Roselle City!"

"Request for support!"

If Ye Tian is an ordinary eternal to the Dao realm, the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom will kill him.

Ye Tiandu also killed a few Eternal Dao Realms!

However, members of the Nine Extremes Alliance are not allowed to fight each other, and once exposed, the punishment will be very severe.

And the Agu Realm Lord hunted down and killed a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance, this is a big problem.

What's more, the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom is still throwing the demon seed into a city, which is a problem.

Ye Tian spread the news everywhere in the Nine Extremes Void, and a high-level person noticed Ye Tian's message.

......

"Ye Tian, a newly promoted member of the Nine Poles Alliance, even broke the assessment record of Jiuhu Mountain. "

"What did the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom do to kill him? and grab the demon seed and throw it into a city?"

This powerhouse doesn't know if the information sent by Ye Tian is true, but this time the turmoil in the Demon Seed Abyss has no warning, it is very weird, and he has not gone to the Demon Seed Abyss to investigate for the time being, but there must be a problem.

"Go to the Agu Country and take a look, don't be the Lord of the Ogu Country this guy is doing something!"

Wow!

He made a quick trip to the land of Ogu.

The other side.

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom will soon catch up with Ye Tian.

And at this time, Ye Tian burned all the origins, even the Eternal Dao Fruit was burned, and his speed skyrocketed, and it was comparable to the speed of the ancient country lord.

Seeing this scene, the Augu Kingdom Lord frowned slightly, but he didn't believe that Ye Tian would be able to hold out for long.

At this time, he still didn't know Ye Tian's communication in the Nine Extremes Void, otherwise he would not have been calm for a long time.

You know, once he is suspected by other members and carefully investigated, he can't hide a lot of things.

Soon.

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom caught up with Ye Tian again, and directly used a secret technique to kill Ye Tian.

But at this moment, a figure came.

"Lord Oku, stop!"

Wow!

A figure intercepted Ye Tian.

And at this time.

Lord Agu was stunned.

"Qinhe !!"

Qin He is not the lord of the country, but he is one of the nine most powerful Eternal Dao Realms in the Nine Extremes Alliance, and his cultivation is a high-grade Eternal Dao Species, and his cultivation has reached the extreme of the Eternal Dao Realm, and he has stepped out of the Eternal Dao Realm in half a step.

More critical speed, Qin He is known as the first speed of the Eternal Dao Realm, and it won't take long to cross a country.

And Qin He didn't go to kill the demon seed, so he ran here.

"Qin He, this little guy has offended me, do you want to keep him?"

Lord Ogu said.

As a last resort, he won't admit his own business.

"It's not that I want to keep him!" Qin Daodao: "It was you who grabbed a demon seed and threw it into Roselle City, and you also had to hunt down Ye Tian, Ye Tian reported you, and you also positioned yourself at any time." I'm curious, why are you doing this?"

"Qin He, don't talk nonsense about things without evidence, as for the demon seed, it wasn't me who threw it in, it was the demon seed that broke into Roselle City by itself. As for him, as a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance, he was the first to escape, so I chased and killed him!" said the Lord of the Augu Kingdom.

"Yes, then let's go to Roselle City together!"

Qin He said.

When the ancient city lord heard this, his face was calm, but his heart was extremely nervous.
